totalSeconds..validate: auth != null || (newData.isNumber() && newData.val() >= 0 && ( (!data.exists() && newData.val() == 0) || ( data.exists() && newData.val() >= data.val() && (newData.val() - data.val()) <= ((newData.parent().child('updatedAt').val() - data.parent().child('updatedAt').val()) / 1000) + 10 ) ))

daySeconds..validate: auth != null || (newData.isNumber() && newData.val() >= 0 && newData.val() <= 21600 && ( !data.exists() || newData.parent().child('dayIndex').val() != data.parent().child('dayIndex').val() || newData.val() >= data.val() ))

weeklySeconds..validate: auth != null || (newData.isNumber() && newData.val() >= 0 && newData.val() <= 151200 && ( !data.exists() || newData.parent().child('weekIndex').val() != data.parent().child('weekIndex').val() || newData.val() >= data.val() ))

streak..validate: auth != null || (newData.isNumber() && newData.val() >= 0 && ( newData.val() <= 1 || ( newData.val() <= data.val() + 1 && (newData.parent().child('updatedAt').val() - data.parent().child('updatedAt').val()) >= 3600000 ) ))
